Privacy Policy Terms of Service Contact Us
Privacy Policy
Last updated: May 23, 2026
Full page
About Sellizi
Sellizi is Africa's digital marketplace at sellizi.store. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
1
Information We Collect
You provide: name, email, profile, product listings, messages, payment details.
Auto-collected: device, browser, IP address, pages visited, error logs.
2
How We Use Your Data
Process purchases & deliver products • Enable buyer-seller messaging • Send transaction confirmations • Detect & prevent fraud.

We never sell your personal data.
3
Data Sharing
We share data only with Supabase (database), PayPal / Mobile Money providers, Chariow for payments, and anonymous analytics. Data disclosed to law enforcement only when legally required.
4
Data Security
AES-256 encryption at rest • TLS in transit • Passwords hashed • Files in private access-controlled storage • SOC 2 compliant infrastructure.
5
Cookies & Tracking
Session cookies to keep you logged in • Local storage for theme & language preferences • Anonymous analytics only. No advertising cookies or tracking pixels.
6
Your Rights
Access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time. Contact privacy@sellizi.store and we will respond within 30 days.
7
Children's Privacy
Sellizi is not intended for users under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from children. Contact us immediately if you believe a child has registered.
8
Contact Us
privacy@sellizi.store
sellizi.store

Terms of Service

Last updated: May 2025

By using Sellizi, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Sellizi, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use our platform.

2. Use of the Platform

You may use Sellizi only for lawful purposes. You must not upload illegal content, infringe on intellectual property rights, or engage in fraudulent activity.

3. Seller Responsibilities

Sellers are responsible for the accuracy of their listings and for delivering products as described. Sellizi takes a platform fee from each transaction as disclosed at checkout.

4. Payments & Refunds

All payments are processed securely. Refund eligibility is determined case-by-case based on our refund policy. Contact support@sellizi.store for disputes.

5. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, at our sole discretion.

6. Contact

Email: support@sellizi.store

⚡ Choose Your Plan
Upgrade to unlock more power
Monthly Yearly -30%
Common Questions
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes. Your plan stays active until the end of the billing period then reverts to Free.
How do I pay?
Via MTN MoMo, Orange Money, Wave or your Sellizi wallet balance.
What happens to my products if I downgrade?
Existing products remain. You just can't add new ones beyond the free limit until you upgrade again.
